text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as summer draws near...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Is there really anything so special about
how McQueen runs?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Recently, Tokai Teio has been watching footage
of Mejiro McQueen's races before training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be trying to find what McQueen has
that she lacks.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I can definitely tell she's strong, but it's
not like she's all-powerful or anything.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, whatever—on to the next one. I've got a
bunch of her races to watch, so I gotta get
through them more quickly.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, i-it's nothing... This is just the race where she
beat me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...I don't need to watch that. I've already seen it
firsthand, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After watching a few more replays, Tokai Teio
gets started with the day's training.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So? Was my time okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Truth be told, despite losing to Mejiro McQueen,
Tokai Teio has been running just fine.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe, knew it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So why does Prez think McQueen's gonna win and
not me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, whatever. It doesn't matter. I need to focus
on my training!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, can you time me for another round? I wanna
do it even faster!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her heart still firm, Tokai Teio keeps training
without losing her positive attitude.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is her strength, her forte. What could she
possibly be missing?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Whoa... McQueen, you're incredible!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: You run so fast, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
It's just like what everyone's been saying. You're
back to your old self!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's not true. I'm an entirely different runner
now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: If you'll excuse me, I'm off to do another lap.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Now that she mentions it... Ever since that losing
streak, her whole attitude has changed.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, her intensity is on a totally different level.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other students have a point. Last year,
despite being considered the top racer, McQueen
suffered a nasty streak of losses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her recent change in attitude seems to stem from
those defeats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: In any case, I'm different than who I was before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
They will all see my ascension. From earth to the
heavens above...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From her interview, I could sense she had the
drive to crawl her way back up from rock bottom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that case, perhaps what Tokai Teio really lacks
is...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew! Finished! So what time did I get? Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you didn't even start the clock! What the
heck are you doing?!
choice_data_list: Teio, are you frustrated that you lost?
Teio, are you frustrated that you lost?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's with the interrogation all of a
sudden?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you mean against McQueen? Yeah, of course.
I was suuuper annoyed.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I can't hang my head forever, you know? I
gotta surpass Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Anyway, forget that! Try actually timing me this
time, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though the strength not to give in to frustration
is one of Teio's best features, it seems to have
become her weak point as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time to watch more of McQueen's races!
You can prep for training while I do, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As usual, Teio drops by to watch McQueen's past
replays, but this time I have a particular race I
want to show her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's this?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, isn't this when I lost to her?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Look, I told you, I've already experienced this. I
don't need to see it again!
choice_data_list: Did you truly see her strength?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: We raced together. Of course I saw all of it...
choice_data_list: Are you sure your frustration didn't blind you?
Are you sure your frustration didn't blind you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm not frustrated anymore! One loss is
nothing—I'll win the next one and make up for it
in no time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Besides, I can't let frustration hold me back!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: If I give in to it, then that means I really was weak!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I have to become good enough to surpass Prez. I have to be stronger!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My words seem to have struck a nerve, which
proves that there's plenty of frustration left in
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's just trying to hide it in order to be "strong."
choice_data_list: Frustration is a powerful source of motivation!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Frustration... motivates people?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: B-but, I mean, like I said... I'm not...
choice_data_list: Acknowledge that pain and become stronger!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But I...
choice_data_list: I'll be right there with you!
I'll be right there with you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's time to begin training...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
How about now, Trainer? I tried to focus on my
footing this time.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All right! I'm gonna go for another lap!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Your spirit seems markedly different
today.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, thanks for coming to see me, but I gotta go
train!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to lose ever again. I don't want to
ever feel this frustrated again either!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So, I'm off! Keep that stopwatch going, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I see. It seems Teio has finally grasped
what is important.
choice_data_list: She's going to become even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Let that frustration propel you higher yet,
Teio!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio takes the pain within her heart, turns it
into power, and starts running once again.
